blocks.text: Glimt shocks Inter — now Madrid and Paris take the stage
Bodø/Glimt's win in Milan was the shock of the CL round. Now PSG–Monaco and Benfica–Madrid are the ties that could still go either way — genuine drama at the top of Europe.
